finding_results.notes: Post-argument fallout now stays on-page with embodied reactions from both characters (Anika leaves food; Ravi scraps his own meal) and an immediate behavioral consequence (he ignores a live collections call) before scene transition.

finding_results.notes: Added direct collections language on-page and explicit debt-driven tradeoffs: referral-fee/escalation window, postponed utility payment, and accepted Saturday overnight shift for differential coverage.

finding_results.notes: Threaded Anika interiority through the intake/billing run so procedural exchanges are repeatedly grounded in sensation, memory, and interpretation.

finding_results.notes: Compressed repetitive intake prompts into denser turns and added multiple leverage shifts (Ravi challenge, Nora correction/forced specificity) before the delinquency-explanation request. Nora stays procedural and exacting; Ravi remains defensive and bargaining, increasing voice separation under pressure.

Retained the debt-math motif while adding non-numeric interruption beats that alter immediate behavior (Anika stops counting, swallows a question, rewrites a planned drill, and switches to concealed note storage).
Recast prior omission-style lines into active alternatives; chapter now contains zero instances of the targeted 'without + gerund/participle' construction.

pass_summaries.summary: All packet findings were addressed with minimal structural churn: intake focalization was restored, collections/debt causality was made explicit, the confrontation now leaves embodied consequence on-page, and the closing lands on behavioral implication rather than overt symbolic labeling.

Revised the intake exchange to remove transcript-style field volleying, introduced at least two leverage shifts before the delinquency explanation prompt, and strengthened distinct rhythm/register between Nora and Ravi while preserving chapter continuity and debt-state facts.
Implemented the prose/copyedit pass for chapter 6 by increasing late-scene rhythmic variance and concrete consequence while preserving voice and continuity; both packet findings are resolved.
